summary: OpenWeather provides current and forecasted weather conditions through its API

steps.title: Create an OpenWeather Account
steps.description: Go to openweathermap.org and sign up for a free account using your work email.
steps.screenshot_hint: You should see the OpenWeather dashboard with a navigation menu at the top.
steps.expected_result: You are logged into the OpenWeather dashboard.

steps.title: Generate an OpenWeather API Key
steps.description: Go to the API keys section and generate a new key.
steps.screenshot_hint: You should see a list of API keys with a button to generate a new one.
steps.expected_result: You have generated a new API key.

common_errors.fix: Your API key is invalid or has been revoked. Generate a new one from the API keys settings page.
You have exceeded the request limit for your API key. Consider upgrading to a paid plan for more requests.

pricing_info: OpenWeather free tier: 60 calls/minute. Paid plans start at $15/month for 500,000 calls.
